channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI is spending $30 billion on a new mega 3.2 GW data center in Georgia — and it's trying really hard to quell local opposition
item.description: OpenAI really wants to avoid the local opposition seen at other data center projects, and is willing to offer commitments to the locals to ensure it's campus gets built.

item.title: The new Halo remake is a reminder of what Xbox used to be
item.description: It's impossible to talk about a new Xbox game without also talking about the state of Xbox. Microsoft's gaming division is in freefall: Recent headlines are dominated by extensive layoffs, decimated studios, and confusing strategies, most of which stem from years of bad decisions and expensive acquisitions. But it wasn't always that way. Through its […]...

item.title: Amazon’s best 4K streaming sticks are up to 40 percent off
item.description: There’s no shortage of great shows and movies to watch, but discovering something new isn’t always easy. Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Plus and Fire TV Stick 4K Max come with redesigned software that aims to make it easier to finding something you’ll like, and both 4K-ready streaming sticks are back to their lowest prices […]

item.title: AI chip startup Etched defies skeptics, hits $10.3B valuation from big-name investors
item.description: Etched, founded by three Harvard dropouts, has created new chips and memory components that speed up inference on any AI model -- no GPUs required, it says.

item.title: Edtech platform raises $4.5M to help teach students how to vibe code
item.description: Imagi announced a $4.5 million seed round, with investors including Brighteye Ventures, Day One Capital, and artist Wil.i.am.

item.title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the Moon
item.description: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.

item.title: Campaign Evolved proves that the first Halo adventure is still fun to play 25 years later
item.description: Halo: Campaign Evolved brings the classic sci-fi shooter to modern standards.

item.title: 'I’m more excited about what’s to come than what we have achieved': Samsung executive on why they built the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Apple's iPhone Ultra threat, and what comes next for foldables
item.description: We sat down with Samsung’s EVP and Head of CX Office, Jay Kim, to discuss the new Galaxy Z Fold 8 series and the future of foldables.

item.title: A new dawn for digital rights? What Burnham’s 'do better' promise could mean for your privacy
item.description: The new UK Prime Minister promises a new future for Britain, and the digital rights community sees it as a chance to rewrite Starmer's divisive digital policing legacy. But will Burnham seize the opportunity to really "do better" for digital privacy?

item.title: Google closes in on another billion user product with Gemini
item.description: Gemini had over 750 million monthly users in February.

item.title: The latest Resident Evil movie trailer has lots of fun nods to the games
item.description: The film, from Weapons director Zach Cregger, hits theaters on September 18.

item.title: Amazon is bringing games to Prime Video
item.description: Amazon is hoping the addition of games can turn Prime Video into a one-stop entertainment destination, borrowing a strategy from Netflix, which has increasingly embraced party games over the past several years.

item.title: Android 17 : passer d’iPhone vers Android est plus facile, mais pas sur tous les Google Pixel
item.description: L'outil de migration d'iOS vers Android s'est amélioré avec Android 17 en transférant plus de données de l'iPhone. Mais attention si vous faites la bascule vers un Pixel de Google. Tous ne sont pas compatibles.

item.title: Galaxy Watch 9 et Watch Ultra 2 : Samsung réserve une bonne surprise à leurs futurs propriétaires
item.description: Alors que la Galaxy Watch 9 et la Watch Ultra 2 viennent d’être dévoilées, Samsung a annoncé étendre la durée de suivi logiciel pour ces deux modèles. Ceux qui achètent l’une de ces deux montres cette année seront tranquilles jusqu’en 2031.

item.title: MeBeMe’s new ‘interrupter’ app helps you become your best self instead of doomscrolling
item.description: MeBeMe delivers small tasks to help users become their best selves instead of endlessly scrolling.

item.title: Lego's latest Nintendo collab is a playable Donkey Kong arcade machine
item.description: Barrels of fun.

item.title: ‘Imagine an automated torture chamber’: I visited Samsung's South Korea factory to see how its Galaxy foldables are tested — and these robots don't miss a beat
item.description: We traveled to South Korea and saw how Samsung tests its latest foldables, the Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra, and Z Flip 8.

item.title: Homicides in the U.S. are on track to reach a historically low number in 2026
item.description: If the downward trend continues, the annual homicide rate would be pushed to the lowest levels in over 100 years. Data collected from 30 American cities showed an 18% decrease in the homicide rate from 2025 compared to the same period in 2026, translating to about 215 fewer homicides this year, according to a new report from the independent Council on Criminal Justice.Should the trend continue, it would push the annual homicide rate to the lowest levels in over a century once final numbers are released at the end of the year.The report, released Thursday, tracked 13 crimes and recorded drops ...

item.title: Mot de passe Google oublié ? Connectez-vous avec une vidéo selfie
item.description: Google déploie une nouvelle manière de récupérer l'accès à votre compte en dehors du classique mot de passe : une courte vidéo de vous. Comment est-ce que ça fonctionne ?

item.title: Reinventing hiring for the AI-driven labor market
item.description: How AI is transforming recruitment while elevating HR into a strategic talent leadership role.

item.title: Intersport casse le prix de son récent vélo électrique premium : 300 € de remise sur le Nakamura Crosslite
item.description: Le Nakamura Crosslite est le vélo électrique urbain haut de gamme d'Intersport : courroie, fourche carbone et moins de 20 kg sur la balance, il a tout pour plaire. Aujourd'hui, il est proposé à 1 599 euros au lieu de 1 899 euros sur Intersport.

item.title: 'Apple is entering 'the touchbar phase' again': MacBook OLED could be on track to launch in a few months, but skeptics still hate that rumored touchscreen
item.description: New report details Apple's Mac plans, including that a MacBook OLED remains on track for a possible release later in 2026.

item.title: 'Two lasers, one box, zero compromise for pro-grade engraving': The xTool F2 Ultra is $1,000 off at Amazon with deep engraving and AI-powered precision
item.description: Looking for a professional laser engraver? The xTool F2 Ultra is now $1,000 off at Amazon.

item.title: SpaceXAI has built a Microsoft Excel Grok plug-in, for some reason
item.description: SpaceXAI launches its own Grok add-ins for Microsoft Excel and other Office apps after other AI vendors see great success.

item.title: Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
item.description: Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an "AI Kill Switch Act" that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, according to a report from Politico. Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the legislation on Thursday. The news of […]

item.title: I'm just glad Samsung's price hikes weren't worse
item.description: It's a sign of how hard we're braced for the RAMpocalypse that Samsung adding just $100 to its prices seems reasonable.

item.title: Your backstage pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 is waiting
item.description: Volunteer at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get a behind-the-scenes look at how one of the world's biggest startup conferences gets built.

item.title: Pourquoi ce PC de Materiel.net équipé d’une RTX 50 a une longueur d’avance pour faire tourner les IA en local ? [Sponso]
item.description: Et si le futur de l’IA se jouait directement sur nos PC, en local ? C’est ce que pense Nvidia avec ses dernières innovations en matière de gestion et d’optimisation des modèles d’IA hébergés localement.

item.title: « Urgence absolue » : Claude découvre une faille qui met en danger 16 millions d’ordinateurs… depuis 2017 !
item.description: Une nouvelle vulnérabilité critique baptisée « RefluXFS » vient d’être découverte au cœur du noyau Linux. Débusquée par Claude Mythos, elle a mis en danger plus de 16 millions d'ordinateurs depuis son apparition en 2017. Elle permet à un simple utilisateur de prendre le contrôle total d’un système. Un correctif a été déployé.

item.title: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era
item.description: Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future. By now I’m sure most Decoder listeners are familiar with Apple’s allegations in this case. The company says a number of ex-Apple employees at […]

item.title: Ford bets on Apple for its next-generation of EVs
item.description: Ford is the first automaker to use a new set of developer tools that will let it embed Apple Maps navigation and mapping directly into its vehicles' infotainment systems.

item.title: 'Excellent' and 'exceptionally flexible': Geekom IT13 mini PC for small business users running office applications and video conferencing tools gets a welcome 10% price cut
item.description: Looking for a compact work PC? Geekom's "excellent" IT13 mini desktop gets a welcome 10% off at Amazon.

item.title: Planning a NAS upgrade? Check out these Seagate IronWolf and BarraCuda hard drive deals at Newegg
item.description: Time to upgrade your NAS? Check out these Seagate IronWolf and BarraCuda hard drive deals at Newegg.

item.title: Lenovo's premium Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ laptop with a 'phenomenal OLED display' is over $420 off at Best Buy
item.description: Save over $420 on Lenovo's premium Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ laptop with a "phenomenal OLED display."

item.title: This new (and very annoying) tactic is forcing RTO companies to let workers work from home
item.description: Meet ‘Bob,’ the avatar for a rising wave of employees who are winning remote privileges by making themselves completely insufferable in person. Employers have made considerable efforts and obtained remarkable results in asking workers to spend more time in the office over the past two years. But while even complying employees usually regret the decreased flexibility those tighter rules involve, some defiant staffers are resorting to tricky ways to safeguard their cherished work-from-home permissions: by being sufficiently irritating to their colleagues and managers that they’re allowed to work...

item.title: I've picked the 10 best back-to-school laptop deals — how to choose between the Dell XPS 13, MacBook Neo, HP OmniBook, and more to get the best value for money
item.description: It's time for another look at all the best back-to-school laptop deals that are available right now, including my top picks from Apple, Dell, HP, Best Buy, Acer, Amazon, and more.

item.title: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
item.description: Ford plans to embed Apple Maps directly into its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform, which will start with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck set for release in 2027. In an announcement on Thursday, Ford says it will use Apple Maps to offer "turn-by-turn directions using natural language, real-time traffic and incident information, intuitive search featuring detailed […]...

item.title: Humans in the loop: how software teams are learning to trust AI
item.description: Treating AI like a virtual teammate is bearing fruit for enterprise teams.

item.title: Star Wars Zero Company takes 30-40 hours to beat 'depending on your difficulty level and experience with the strategy genre' but won't have a New Game Plus mode
item.description: Bit Reactor has confirmed that Star Wars Zero Company will take up to 40 hours to finish, and it won't have a New Game Plus mode.

item.title: This devious malware scans over 300 apps to build an AI profile telling hackers which victims to target
item.description: Malware started talking to their bosses, telling them where to strike next.

item.title: Garmin backtracks on Cirqa subscription after outcry from fans and makes a crucial feature available for free
item.description: Garmin has decided that users of the new Cirqa should be able to access real time hear rate data without a subscription.

item.title: EcoFlow RIVER 2 : l’une des plus légères stations portables pour le camping chute sous les 200 € sur Amazon
item.description: L'EcoFlow RIVER 2, station électrique portable d'entrée de gamme du constructeur, est actuellement proposée à 198 euros au lieu de 229 euros sur Amazon. Avec ses 3,5 kg et sa batterie LiFePO4 de 256 Wh, elle est clairement taillée pour le camping.

item.title: Dutton Ranch season 2 has all-but confirmed a release window after Ed Harris revealed filming complaints — and there's a huge change to the Yellowstone spinoff that nobody is talking about
item.description: By now, most Dutton Ranch fans will have seen Variety's explosive interview with star Ed Harris — but we've not properly addressed what this means for season 2.

item.title: There isn't a single consumer Wi-Fi router that is 100% American-made
item.description: You get a waiver! You get a waiver!

item.title: L’OMS blanchit le smartphone : la science n’a trouvé aucun lien avec le cancer du cerveau
item.description: L'OMS a passé 28 ans de recherche au tamis : aucun lien entre le téléphone et les cancers du cerveau, de la tête ou du cou. Pendant ce temps, la France affichait ses DAS et retirait des iPhone.

item.title: 'We carefully verified the silicon-carbon battery so that our users can trust it and use it with competence': Samsung execs on how it tuned the latest battery technology — and why that matters
item.description: Samsung is introducing silicon-carbon batteries into all of its new Galaxy Z 8 devices. But what does that mean, and how did Samsung do it?

item.title: Galaxy Watch : Samsung teste déjà One UI 9 Watch sur ses anciennes montres connectées
item.description: Samsung vient tout juste d'officialiser One UI 9 Watch sur ses nouvelles montres. Mais la marque teste déjà l'interface sur des Galaxy Watch plus anciennes, jusqu'à la Watch 5.
